title: Harrandatha Estillo

{{Quote|And as sure as Eiattu revolves around the sun, my little brother, Prince Harrandatha was mad.|[[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plourr Ilo]]|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess]]''</ref>}}
'''Harrandatha Estillo''', also known as '''Harran''', was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] prince who served as a member of the royal family of [[Eiattu 6]], a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] world (possibly capital of [[Ado sector/Legends|Ado sector]]) which retained its monarchical government under the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

After his death, he was replaced by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agent.

==Biography==
===The true Harran===
{{Quote|He screamed for the nobles to come and get me. He screamed of how he wanted to watch as they slit my throat, and then he would be Emperor.|Plourr Ilo|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess" />}}
[[File:Vader_Harran.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] playing with Harran]]
The son and heir apparent of the reigning monarch, [[Uthorrferrell Cartha]], Harran had a vicious, psychotic personality, and from boyhood supported the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. His personal hero was [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], and on a visit to Eiattu, the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] molded the young prince as his protégé and proxy, using mental manipulation to transform his hot-blooded sadism into something cold and calculating.

During Harran's childhood, the Eiattauan nobility overthrew the royal family and sent them into internal exile, forming a ruling council, known as the [[Priamsta]], to govern in their stead. A faction of the Priamsta resolved to murder the dynasty, but Harran was killed not by the nobles or their agents, but rather by his sister, [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plourr]], whom he attempted to stop from escaping so that he could watch her die. Plourr clubbed him to death with a rock, and left his body in the bush for the [[Thuvasaur]]s to eat.

===The false Harran===
{{Quote|This false Harran truly believes that he ''is'' Harran. He has all of the true Harran's memories. He believes in his cause, but more in the power the PLB will give him. And he truly loves me, the fool.|[[Leonia Tavira]]|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess" />}}
[[File:False_Harran.jpg|thumb|right|150px|The false Harran]]
Years later, a [[Harrandatha Estillo (impostor)|man]] claiming to be Prince Harran led the revolutionary [[People's Liberation Battalion]] against the Priamsta, apparently satisfying tests to prove his bloodline, and wearing the ring which Vader had given the prince—in fact an Imperial mind-control device.

However, he was not only an impostor, but an agent—and lover—of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Leonia Tavira]]. This false prince was exposed by the returned Plourr, who took the leadership of her people after the expulsion of the Empire. Harran's ring hand was blasted away in a firefight, and he was reduced to a catatonic state, his mind destroyed.
